title: Grilled Sardine Skewers with German Charm
description: A simple yet flavorful dish that combines the delicate taste of sardines with the crunch of crispy vegetables, all grilled to perfection.
instructions: Soak skewers in water for at least 30 minutes.
In a large bowl, mix together chopped sardines, shredded cabbage, chopped bacon, salt, and black pepper.
Drain and thread the sardine mixture onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with German-Style mustard.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the sardines are cooked through and the cabbage is slightly charred.
